name: Prime Medicine, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview We are a biotechnology company focused on developing a new class of genetic medicines designed to provide durable, and potentially curative, treatment options for patients with diseases driven by defined genetic alterations, acquired cellular dysfunction, or dysregulated gene expression. Our approach is grounded in Prime Editing, a next-generation gene editing technology that enables targeted modifications to genomic DNA without introducing double-stranded breaks. We believe Prim...
